headline: Employers shift from bigger pay budgets to smarter pay strategies, WTW finds
summary: NEW YORK, July 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Average salary increase budgets for US companies in 2027 are expected to remain stable at 3.4%, just slightly lower than 2026’s actual increase of 3.5%. This is according to the latest Salary Budget Planning Report by WTW (NASDAQ: WTW), a leading global advisory, broking and solutions company. The report found that pay budgets remained largely steady in 2025, with nearly 60% of organizations reporting no change between anticipated and actual salary bud
